title: Newsletter Extension
description: Product-level extension providing newsletter-specific metadata. Attach as ext.newsletter on media products with channel 'email' to describe subscriber audience, send cadence, content categories, and upcoming sendouts.

avg_open_rate.description: Average open rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.45 for 45%)

avg_click_rate.description: Average click-through rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.03 for 3%)

avg_click_to_open_rate.description: Average click-to-open rate (CTOR) as a decimal — unique clicks divided by unique opens. More reliable than avg_click_rate when open rates are inflated by Apple Mail Privacy Protection.

send_frequency.description: How often the newsletter is sent

send_days.description: Days of the week the newsletter is typically sent

typical_send_time.description: Typical send time in HH:MM format (24-hour, publisher local time)

language.description: Primary language of the newsletter content (BCP 47 language tag, e.g., 'en', 'de', 'fr')

country.description: Primary country of the subscriber base (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g., 'US', 'GB', 'DE')

categories.description: IAB content taxonomy categories describing the newsletter's editorial focus

subscriber_consent_type.description: How subscribers were acquired and consented to receive the newsletter

dark_mode_support.description: Whether the newsletter template supports dark mode rendering

share.description: Fraction of subscribers using this client (e.g., 0.35 for 35%)

email_client_distribution.description: Distribution of subscribers across email clients

creative_deduplication.description: Policy for whether the same creative may appear on multiple placements within a single sendout. When 'required', the buyer must assign distinct creatives to each placement. When 'none', the same creative can appear on all placements. Defaults to 'none' if omitted.
